scripts.hostinger:admin: npm exec pnpm -- install --frozen-lockfile && npm run prisma:generate && npm exec pnpm -- --filter @prototype/admin build
scripts.hostinger:agent: npm exec pnpm -- install --frozen-lockfile && npm run prisma:generate && npm exec pnpm -- --filter @prototype/agent build
scripts.hostinger:worker: npm exec pnpm -- install --frozen-lockfile && npm run prisma:generate
